description_long: This lamp features a tall, slender vertical pole supporting a cluster of dark, leaf-like elements arranged in a tree-like formation, giving it a highly decorative and organic appearance. The 'leaves' are densely packed and appear to be made of a dark, possibly metallic or glassy material, with a subtle reflective quality. The base is minimal and unobtrusive, allowing the focus to remain on the intricate upper structure. The lamp's design is reminiscent of a sculptural floor lamp, blending natural motifs with modern aesthetics. The overall silhouette is elegant and vertical, making it suitable as a statement piece in urban parks or upscale public spaces. The lamp does not display any visible bulbs, suggesting the light source may be integrated within the leaf cluster.
description: A tall, sculptural floor lamp with a tree-like cluster of dark, leaf-shaped elements atop a slender pole, blending organic and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full vertical structure with the dense, tree-like leaf cluster clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the depth and layering of the leaf elements, as well as the slenderness of the pole.
description_view_2: Rear or top-down view, with the lamp's pole barely visible and the leaf cluster not discernible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view, again emphasizing the three-dimensional arrangement of the leaf cluster and the vertical pole.
